news.t: Defiance Launches COPZ: The First Daily 2X Long ETF For Copper Miners

holdings.infoBox: COPZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 57.78%, GLOBAL X COPPER SWAP CLST-L at 46.01%, GLOBAL X COPPER SWAP MREX-L at 41.45%, GLOBAL X COPPER SWAP CANT-L at 39.41%, and GLOBAL X COPPER SWAP NMRA-L at 37.82%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long Copper Miners ETF (COPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of the Global X Copper Miners ETF (COPX), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. COPZ was launched on Feb 17, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches COPZ: The First Daily 2X Long ETF For Copper Miners
data.text: MIAMI, Feb. 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long Copper ETF (COPZ) , expanding its lineup of single-stock and single-ETF leveraged...
